tsTroubleshooting.domains: (topic tsTroubleshooting) (topic hi-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic ut-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic sw-d) (topic ui-d) (topic oce-d) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c tsTroubleshooting oceTroubleshooting-c)
tsTroubleshooting.title: 21589 Lost communication with MORPF PBA

abstract.p: The connection between main node (embedded controller) and sub node ( µMORPF PBA) is lost.

note.p: This error often is reported as follow up error since power supplies are switched off. Only act on it when no other errors occurred.

tsCauses.p: This error can be caused by an unreliable connection (power supply, ethernet, board to board) when reported as a single error.

li.p: Check 24V logic powersupply input (from distribution PBA to uMorpf PBA)
Check the Ethernet connection (from EMBEDDED_CONTROLLER to uMorpf PBA)
Check the correct placement of Phantom PBA into uMorpf PBA
